option.name: originalContent
option.value:
FROM node:18-alpine as build
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./ RUN npm install
COPY . . RUN npm run build
FROM nginx:alpine
COPY --from=build /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html
EXPOSE 80
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Build stage FROM node:18-alpine as build
# Set working directory WORKDIR /app
# Copy package files COPY package*.json ./
# Install dependencies RUN npm install
# Copy source code COPY . .
# Build the app RUN npm run build
# Production stage FROM nginx:alpine
# Copy nginx config COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
# Copy built app to nginx COPY --from=build /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html
# Expose port 80 EXPOSE 80
# Start nginx CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jdk
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN chmod +x gradlew RUN ./gradlew build -x test
EXPOSE 8082
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "build/libs/schoolInventory-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jdk
WORKDIR /app
# Copy all files from schoolInventory directory COPY . .
# Make gradlew executable RUN chmod +x gradlew
# Build the application RUN ./gradlew build -x test
EXPOSE 8082
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "build/libs/schoolInventory-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar"]
